title: Projects
text:
Here are some apps I have realized. How to turn pleasure in pain.

Tools written in Python

BasicBusiness : a .exe used to manage sales in an improvised restaurant. Used in real life, Thermal Printer compatible.


<a href="https://freddocastoro.itch.io/cassapaniniexe">Basic Business (version 8.0) by freddocastoro</a>


Better Image : a streamlit app to apply special filters to images.
Kalman Video Denoiser : a streamlit app to denoise a video in real time from a camera (webcam or FPV camera video feed) using a simple and efficient adaptive Kalman Filter. This app seems pretty useful for really noisy cameras (such as FPV drones real time cameras).
Instaronno : a streamlit app to analyze a social network get from some Saronno IG users



Unity Games written in C#

Key vs Mickey : a two players game for mouse vs keyboard


<a href="https://freddocastoro.itch.io/key-vs-mickey">Key vs Mickey by freddocastoro</a>


Saronno Legend : Explore Saronno City with Earth, maybe as a star fighter


<a href="https://freddocastoro.itch.io/saronno-legend">Saronno Legend by freddocastoro</a>

title: Personal webpage of Federico Rausa
text:
Welcome
Hi! I’m Fede, and I love data science, old music and good books.
I have a bachelor degree in economics and a master in statistics.
I’m also good at programming (my favourite languages are R, Python and Arduino).
If You want to know me, here are my contacts.
My academic background is resumend here while my life background is here.
If You have free time (I hope that) and need a good book, I suggest these.
If You wish to play a musical instrument but You are lazy, I suggest the ukulele.

title: About Me
text:
Personal Background
I live in Saronno, a small but populous city between Milan and Varese, since I was born. However my family is for the most from Genova, where I try to go every time I can (sadly very few times, I’m not a good traveler).
Since childhood I have a deep passion for books.
I think that the best way to describe myself is to cite my favourite authors: Dostoevskij, Tolkien, H.Hesse, C.S.Lewis . However, my main interests go around data science topics (specifically computational efficiency and non tabular data structures, such as time series, graphs, texts, etc) and economics (I actually think that the best way to describe economic phenomena in a qualitative way is using statistical methods).
I have many passions now: music, game development, robotics, trading, law, literature, macroeconomics, microeconomics, computational efficiency, and many many others.
Since in the best case I human like me can live just 100 years, and You have to make a choice in your life, and I didn’t want to give up to anything, I decide to go for Statistics (the JOLLY of knowledge). My original passion was maybe more about logic, but I realized that statistics is just logic+probability, that is more spendable in life, and that is immensely more useful.
There are many economists, poor guys, who have the same passion for logic and philosphy that I had, and who have then struggled studying Game Theory, thinking that they could get something useful from that (I obviously gave 3 exams of Game Theory).
Since a statistician withouth a PC is pretty useless in these years, I also developed a natural passion for computer sciences. I’m actually son of two ICT workers, so it came almost naturally for me to learn programming languages.
Now my road is mapped: always learn and be better. Time is the last enemy of happiness.

title: About Me
text:
Academic Background
I have a master degree in Statistics and a bachelor degree in Economics. During my Thesis project for the master, I had the opportunity to develop a topic model for the python package OCTIS, and grow my NLP knowledge.
The main activities of my academic years are here.

title: About Me
text:
Education

Degree in Statistical and economics sciences, University of Milan - Bicocca (2025)
Degree in Economics and Management, University of Varese - Insubria (2023)

I have done the High School of S.M. Legnani, in Saronno. I didn’t learn latin, and maybe sometimes I think that could be a good way thing to know, but I’m happy anyway. Many people say that it opens your mind, but I don’t think that the same people knows at least what is python. At the same High School, I also written for the School Newspaper, Inpuntadipenna, that is active yet today. That was a lovely experience. My articles were published here, but then they moved the new website here.

title: Statistical Notes
text:
Here are few statistical writings I have done during my academic years:

papers:

Italian:

Master thesis : Boltzmann Machines for Topic Modeling.
Bachelor thesis : Cluster Algorithms for Sector Analysis
Analisi di concentrazione del settore dei trasporti : exam project for Economia e Dinamica Industriale (Master)
Airlines delay : exam projects for Fondamenti di data analytics (Bachelor)



English:

Milan House Prices : fourth place on a private Kaggle competition, 50 participants. Projects for the exam of Data Mining (Master)




presentations:

Italian:

Master thesis presentation : Boltzmann Machines for Topic Modeling.
STMicroelectronics Lab Data Challenge : Solution proposed for the Lab Data Challenge proposed by STM. The aim was to predict the presence of a person in a room from the wifi noise frequencies coming from the router. (Master)
Proposta di Fedelity Card per clienti di profumerie: Exam project for Analisi di mercato quantitative (Master)
Segmentazione dei consumatori del mercato vestiario: Exam project for Analisi di mercato quantitative (Master)
Analisi di concentrazione del settore dei trasporti: exam project for Economia e Dinamica Industriale (Master)
Segmentazione caratteriale dei manager: Exam project for Statistica Aziendale (Master). An example usage of the software KNIME.
Alberi di decisione per l’imputazione dei dati mancanti nei questionari: Exam project for Statistica Aziendale (Master). An example usage of the software KNIME.
PCA per l’analisi dei questionari: Exam project for Statistica Aziendale (Master). An example usage of the software KNIME.



English:

Automated Essay Scoring : for the exam of Machine Learning (Master), based on text mining task




notebooks:

Italian:

STMicroelectronics Lab Data Challenge : Solution proposed for the Lab Data Challenge proposed by STM. The aim was to predict the presence of a person in a room from the wifi noise frequencies coming from the router. (Master)
Retina Cancer : first place solution on a private Kaggle competition, 8 participants, for the exam of Statistical Learning (Master)
POS tagger : Project made for the exam of Statistical Learning (Master). It is not a good way to train a POS tagger. Maybe If You want to train a neural network You should use directly python, and don’t switch to Keras for R.
Analisi di concentrazione del settore dei trasporti: exam project for Economia e Dinamica Industriale (Master)
Statistica Spaziale in R: R code notes from Spatial Statistics (Master)



English:

Kernel Clustering for text : If You try to apply common clustering algorthms to Bag of Words Text representations, You will obtain random clusters. However, when I use Kernel distances with Kmeans for the Italian Constitution articles, I get pretty good results.
Pytorch MNIST : a very simple exercise to train a neural network with the most common python library in the most classical and simple task (written digit classification from images).
